title: Lady Louise’s graduation photos spark buzz as royal fans see young Queen Elizabeth II in her
summary_full: The 22-year-old celebrated her St Andrews graduation before receiving the Duke of Edinburgh's Gold Award, but it was her striking resemblance to her late grandmother, Queen Elizabeth II, that set social media abuzz.
summary_public: The 22-year-old celebrated her St Andrews graduation before receiving the Duke of Edinburgh's Gold Award, but it was her striking resemblance to her late grandmother, Queen Elizabeth II, that set social media abuzz.
